response.step_by_step_log: Identified song 1 ('Beautiful') via on-screen text at 00:00. Identified song 2 ('GREATEST') via on-screen text and credits at 04:26. Used search queries 'Beautiful Otonose Kanade Japanese and English lyrics' and 'GREATEST Otonose Kanade Japanese and English lyrics' to confirm titles and performers. Note: Lyrics for both songs were confirmed via search.
response.global_summary: A two-song live performance by VTuber Otonose Kanade, featuring the songs 'Beautiful' and 'GREATEST', with a short conversational break between the performances.

scenes.description: Otonose Kanade performs the song 'Beautiful' on a brightly lit stage.
Otonose Kanade speaks to the audience and drinks water.
Otonose Kanade performs the song 'GREATEST' on stage. Song credits (Nanahoshi Orchestra/Riku Iwami) appear on-screen.
